mapper.select: select e.id, e.username, e.password, e.name, e.gender, e.phone, e.job, e.salary, e.image, e.entry_date, e.dept_id, e.create_time, e.update_time, d.name as deptName, expr.id as empExprId, expr.emp_id, expr.begin, expr.end, expr.company, expr.job as exprJob from emp e left join dept d on e.dept_id = d.id left join emp_expr expr on e.id = expr.emp_id where e.id = #{id}

select (case when job = 1 then '班主任' when job = 2 then '讲师' when job = 3 then '学工主管' when job = 4 then '教研主管' when job = 5 then '咨询师' else '其他' end) as pos, count(*) as num from emp group by job order by num
select (case when gender = 1 then '男' when gender = 2 then '女' else '其他' end) as pos, count(*) as num from emp group by gender order by num
mapper.delete:
delete from emp where id in
#{id}
